name: Chicken and Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat the water, bouillon cubes, and chicken in a large saucepan over medium heat until the water reaches a boil.
2 In a separate bowl, mix the Bisquick with 2/3 cup of milk to form a batter.
3 Carefully pour spoonfuls of the Bisquick mixture into the boiling liquid, stirring gently to avoid splattering.
4 Cover the saucepan and reduce the heat to low. Simmer for 10-12 minutes until the dumplings are cooked through.
